title: Quin Zaza
overview: New to the airship, Takita struggles to find her place alongside eccentric draker Mika. The crew deals with stubborn locals and other scaly problems.

title: Bounty & Dragonet alla Diavola
overview: Takita learns more about the business of draking. But when a strange dragon boards the ship, she takes matters into her own hands. Sort of.

title: Glittering Dragon
overview: Everyday life on the Quin Zaza is hectic but fun. As a violent storm sets in, Giraud tells Takita about the mythical glittering dragon.

title: Reasons for Flying & Dragon Terinne
overview: Hijinks ensue when an intimate drawing of Vannie appears. Takita spends some time with her before Mika and a strange dragon cause an uproar.

title: Sky Pirates & Pastrami
overview: The Quin Zaza prepares to make a long-awaited landfall in the city of Quon. But another ship's distress signal puts them in the path of air pirates.

title: Festival & Dragon Laghman
overview: The crew lands in Quon. Takita gets new responsibilities, and Mika takes her to visit an old tribesman. Giraud takes a chance while out with the boys.

title: Disaster & Edible Dragons
overview: Disaster strikes the city as a rival ship fails to subdue a dragon. The Quin Zaza crew comes to the rescue despite Mika's ulterior motives.

title: Operation:Take Down the Rampaging Dragon
overview: The crew continue their efforts to put down the rampaging dragon. Giraud takes matters into his own hands in order to protect the city.

title: Soup Kitchen Goulash & Dragon Cutlet
overview: The Malotao assist with butchering and rendering the dragon's corpse. The smallest crew members get stuck with an icky job; Katja helps with cooking.

title: Migrating Dragons & the Chasm Depths
overview: Everyday life on the ship resumes, until the crew take on an arduous task and Takita goes overboard. Injured, she receives some unexpected help.

title: Dragonet & Dragon Brain Hunter Stew
overview: Takita struggles to eat her next meal. After Aschera brings her and their little companion to her people, she makes a serious decision.

title: Dragon Corridor
overview: The crew's desperate search comes to a satisfying end, but when an unbelievable opportunity arrives, Takita takes care of some final business.
